about.name: TRIPP
about.tagline: builder of things // breaker of things
about.bio: Developer and creative based somewhere with good Wi-Fi. I read books, play games, and ship things to the internet.

games.title: Hollow Knight

games.title: Destiny 2
games.notes: that's 728 hours on PC alone. that does not include my multiple completions of the red war campaign and year 1/2 DLCs on PS4.

projects.name: SeaWeed League
projects.description: A fake collegiate sports league. Two universities built so far — Shrimple (Drexel parody) and LIT (MIT parody). Full dashboards, auth, and campus pages.

projects.name: Personal Dashboard
projects.description: This site. A Y2K pastel cyberpunk dashboard tracking what I'm reading, playing, and building. Hand-edited JSON, zero dependencies.

projects.name: Yggy D&D world
projects.description: A homebrew D&D 5e world built in Obsidian, documenting the Yggdrasil setting across 25 nations, 11 playable species, and a growing archive of historical events. Campaigns are run as drop-in sessions with living canon — completed campaigns permanently shape the world for every game that follows.
